Probably Emirate of Granada

Fragment with Nasrid Coat of Arms
by Probably Emirate of Granada
Granada province · Arts of the Islamic World · 1395–1405 · Silk and gilt-animal-substrate-wrapped silk; satin weave with secondary binding warps and supplementary patterning wefts
←Francesco Granacci Smith, Arthur Granville→
